title: Blockchain Engineers
description: Maintain and support distributed and decentralized blockchain-based networks or block-chain applications such as cryptocurrency exchange, payment processing, document sharing, and digital voting. Design and deploy secure block-chain design patterns and solutions over geographically distributed networks using advanced technologies. May assist with infrastructure setup and testing for application transparency and security.

tasks.text: Assess blockchain threats, such as untested code and unprotected keys.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Automate the deployment of software updates over geographically distributed network nodes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design and deploy blockchain design patterns to make transactions secure, transparent, and immutable.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and develop blockchain technologies for industries such as finance and music.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and implement dashboard and data visualizations to meet customer reporting needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and implement data repositories to integrate data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and verify cryptographic protocols to protect private information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine specifications for, or implement, logging.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Develop a maintainable code base using object-oriented design principles, practices, or patterns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss and plan systems with solution architects, system engineers, or cybersecurity experts to meet customer requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss data needs with engineers, product managers, or data scientists to identify blockchain requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate blockchain processes or risks based on security assessments or control matrix reviews.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate new blockchain technologies and vendor products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Implement catastrophic failure handlers to identify security breaches and prevent serious damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Run infrastructure tests to examine the behavior of large peer-to-peer networks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test the security and performance of blockchain infrastructures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Update client and server applications responsible for integration and business logic.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
